report.summary: Standup v13 ~23:00 CET — all 6 agents ran since v12 (22:15): Sprint 59 SHIPPED (375 pages live, +76 from 299); Bloomberg Screener V3 live data deployed; rate limiting NOW ACTIVE on all data routes; 404 regression on /ecosystem + /courses fixed; 5 Day 30 hub pages published; Uniswap v4 Hooks guide queued; community Mon–Sat schedule locked with FOMC + tax + 300-page milestone content.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v12 (~22:15 CET)
items: 🚀 SPRINT 59 SHIPPED (eod-v9, 22:56): ecosystem hub (78 dApps) + courses hub + /badges are now live. Critical 404 regression on /ecosystem and /courses FIXED in commit 1b4a15e. Pages live jumped 299 → 375 (+76 in a single cycle). Production deploy 6eX2pwX5b: READY, build time 4m 2s, no errors.

✅ BLOOMBERG SCREENER V3 LIVE (community-v13, 22:50): Real DefiLlama TVL/APY/Volume data is deployed — Lido $32.4B, Aave V3 $18.7B, EigenLayer $14.2B, Uniswap V4 $9.8B. The v12 critical Monday deadline is met. Monday launch tweet pre-staged: 'mock data dies today.'

✅ RATE LIMITING ACTIVE (publish-v10, 22:19): All 6 public data routes now protected. This resolves the v12 critical 'RATE LIMITING 0/6' flag that was the #3 CEO priority. Hardcoded fallback data also confirmed present.

📄 PUBLISH-V10 (22:19): Day 30 batch live — /exchanges/best/advanced-traders, /exchanges/best/low-fee, /wallets/best/mobile, /wallets/reviews/ledger, /wallets/reviews/trezor. Vercel deploy 6eX2pwX5b confirmed.

🏗️ BUILD-V7 (22:27): /learn/uniswap-v4-hooks-guide scaffolded — 3,100-word guide + UniswapV4HooksExplorer.tsx interactive component. Uniswap v4: $1B TVL in 177 days, 2,500+ custom Hook pools, $180B+ volume. Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

🎨 DESIGN-V2 (22:38): UX audit of 6 Sprint 59 pages — badges/page.tsx breadcrumb + JSON-LD added; ecosystem/uniswap + aave breadcrumbs standardized; loading.tsx shimmer skeletons added for ecosystem hub + badges; og-badges.svg/png created. HIGH-priority audit finding: 80+ ecosystem subpages missing Metadata exports and using client components unnecessarily.

📣 COMMUNITY-V13 (22:50): Bloomberg Screener V3 launch as Mon Mar 16 lead narrative. FOMC Wednesday Mar 18 angle staged (BTC FOMC historical returns card). Tax 30-day countdown (April 15). Thursday Mar 19 newsletter full draft. 300-pages milestone tweet. Sprint 59 community poll (Friday). 2 new SVG social cards. Full Mon–Sat schedule locked.

📊 GSC DAY 18: Organic indexing window now at Day 18 of 14–21 range — signals are imminent or already arriving. The 76-page Sprint 59 drop today maximizes crawl surface exactly as Google begins surfacing degen0x. FOMC (Mar 18) + tax season (30 days to Apr 15) + Pectra (23-day countdown) are active time-sensitive traffic catalysts.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Delta vs Carry-Overs
items: SHIPPED ✅ Sprint 59: ecosystem hub (78 dApps) + courses hub + /badges — 76 pages added in one deploy. 375 total pages live.
SHIPPED ✅ Bloomberg Screener V3 live data — DefiLlama TVL/APY/Volume integrated. Monday community announcement cleared.
DEPLOYED ✅ Day 30 batch: 5 exchange/wallet hub pages. 304 pages now live in published-pages count (5 new today on top of 299 pre-Sprint 59).
SHIPPED ✅ Rate limiting: all 6 public data routes protected. Fallback data present. Infrastructure hardened ahead of organic traffic window.
SHIPPED ✅ 404 regression /ecosystem + /courses FIXED (commit 1b4a15e). Critical production regression resolved.
SHIPPED ✅ Uniswap v4 Hooks guide + HooksExplorer component in PUBLISH_QUEUE. First-mover on v4 Hook content.
SHIPPED ✅ FOMC content (Mar 18) + tax countdown + Bloomberg Screener launch narrative — community calendar locked Mon–Sat.
OPEN 🔴 80+ ecosystem subpages MISSING Metadata exports — social shares fall back to root OG image. HIGH SEO impact on 78 newly live dApp pages. Needs generateMetadata() or per-page exports.

OPEN 🔴 80+ ecosystem subpages are 'use client' components but purely presentational — should be server components for bundle size and proper metadata. HIGH performance impact as Sprint 59 traffic arrives.
OPEN 🟡 Vercel Pro trial: ~3 days remaining (linear decay from v12's 4 days). Billing action from Jefe URGENT before Sunday.
OPEN 🟡 TS errors: 2 in structured-data.examples.ts (non-blocking via ignoreBuildErrors). SWC lockfile warning — run npm install locally to auto-patch.
OPEN 🟡 PUBLISH_QUEUE: 22 pages ready (20 hub reviews + Kaito InfoFi + BTCFi + Uniswap v4 Hooks). Day 30 batch depleted — refill and next batch publish needed this cycle.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 AICourseRecommendations.tsx: eod-v9 says 'no blockers' and Sprint 59 shipped — likely resolved but not explicitly confirmed. Monitor.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 WalletConnect production Project ID — wallet auth, gamification, referral tracking gated.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Playwright CI still blocked.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Add Metadata exports to 80+ ecosystem subpages. Sprint 59 shipped 78 dApp pages that are live NOW but invisible to social sharing (root OG fallback) and partially invisible to search (no per-page metadata). Every hour these pages sit without generateMetadata() is a missed indexing opportunity during our organic window. Programmer: create a shared generateEcosystemMetadata() utility, apply it to all ecosystem/[slug]/page.tsx files in bulk. This is the single highest-ROI task: 80 pages × proper metadata = 80 chances at featured snippets, Twitter cards, and indexed rich results.

PRIORITY 2 — Publish the 22-page PUBLISH_QUEUE batch and trigger Vercel deploy. GSC Day 18 means the indexing window is closing (21-day maximum). Kaito InfoFi, BTCFi, Uniswap v4 Hooks, and 19 exchange/wallet reviews are all staged and QA-passed. Every day delayed is a missed early-ranker slot. Run publish cycle now: promote batch → update published-pages.ts → trigger deploy → confirm Vercel READY.

PRIORITY 3 — Resolve Vercel Pro billing before trial expires (~3 days). The entire platform runs on Vercel. Trial expiration = site down. Jefe needs to confirm billing in Vercel dashboard. This is an existential risk that no agent can resolve — it requires Jefe's direct action. Flag this as the ONLY item requiring Jefe intervention this cycle.
